name: template_3
code:
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local XP_NEED = {{XP_PER_LEVEL}}
local MAX_LEVEL = {{MAX_LEVEL}}
local function setup(plr)
	local ls = plr:WaitForChild("leaderstats")
	local lvl = ls:FindFirstChild("Level") or Instance.new("IntValue")
	lvl.Name = "Level"
	lvl.Value = 1
	lvl.Parent = ls
	local xp = ls:FindFirstChild("XP") or Instance.new("IntValue")
	xp.Name = "XP"
	xp.Value = 0
	xp.Parent = ls
	xp.Changed:Connect(function()
		while xp.Value >= XP_NEED and lvl.Value < MAX_LEVEL do
			xp.Value -= XP_NEED
			lvl.Value += 1
		end
	end)
end
Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(p) task.defer(setup, p) end)
